fun_fact: You cannot have missed the word 'El Niño' recently. But what exactly is El Niño? El Niño is a climatic phenomenon in the Pacific ocean that has a huge impact on India. For starters, it's probably the reason monsoon has been delayed massively this year. It causes a below average monsoon and more intense heatwaves → poor agricultural yield → inflation. [See Explainer](https://youtu.be/yw3XNZ1bRdE?si=WVm_Qcqlccv2BuRH)
